nasb.text: and to those who were selling the doves He said, “Take these things away; stop making My Father’s house a place of business.”

esv.text: And he told those who sold the pigeons, “Take these things away; do not make my Father’s house a house of trade.”

cnv.text: 又對賣鴿子的說：“把這些東西搬出去，不要把我父的殿當作巿場。”

ccb.text: 又对卖鸽子的说：“把这些东西拿出去！不要把我父的殿当作市场。”

csbs.text: 又对卖鸽子的人说：“把这些东西从这里拿走！不要把我父的殿当成做买卖的地方！”
